hero.title: La Table Dorée
hero.subtitle: A unique gastronomic experience in the heart of Paris — where every dish tells a story and every meal becomes an unforgettable memory.

about.title: A Passion Passed Down Through Generations
about.description1: Founded in 1987 by Chef Henri Beaumont, La Table Dorée was born from a simple vision: to offer authentic French gastronomy in an exceptional setting. For thirty-six years, this place has become a Parisian institution recognized worldwide.
about.description2: Today, under the direction of Chef Lucas Beaumont, we perpetuate this legacy with creativity and passion. Every plate is composed of the finest seasonal produce, sourced from local producers committed to responsible farming.
about.chefQuote: Cooking is the art of transforming simple ingredients into extraordinary emotions.

menu.title: A Menu Crafted for Excellence
menu.subtitle: Discover our signature dishes, crafted with the finest seasonal produce and served with absolute perfection.

items.dish1Desc: Homemade fig chutney, toasted brioche with Guérande butter, aged port vinaigrette
items.dish2Desc: Bay of Seine scallops, Osciètre caviar, yuzu emulsion, Provence olive oil
items.dish3Desc: Wagyu beef, seared foie gras escalope, Périgueux truffle sauce, potato gratin
items.dish4Desc: Brittany lobster, shellfish bisque, confit fennel, Champagne beurre blanc
items.dish5Desc: Warm orange soufflé, Corsican mandarin sorbet, Valrhona chocolate lace
items.dish6Desc: Caramelized puff pastry, Tahitian vanilla diplomat cream, salted Breton caramel

menu.pageSubtitle: A menu evolving with the seasons, crafted daily by our brigade.
menu.priceNote: Prices are in euros, service included. Please inform us of any allergies.

gallery.title: Elegance at Every Moment
gallery.subtitle: Immerse yourself in the unique atmosphere of La Table Dorée — from our open kitchen to our luminous dining room.

testimonials.title: What Our Guests Say
testimonials.subtitle: Unforgettable experiences shared by our guests from around the world.

items.t1Text: A transcendent experience. Every dish is a work of art, the room radiates elegance, and the service has a rare attentiveness. La Table Dorée is without doubt the best restaurant I have ever visited.
items.t2Text: Words fail to describe this experience. From the moment we entered to the last bite of dessert, everything was perfection. Chef Beaumont's foie gras is simply life-changing.
items.t3Text: We were celebrating our 10th wedding anniversary. La Table Dorée exceeded all our expectations. The attention to detail, the cuisine, the atmosphere... A memory we will never forget.
items.t4Text: In my thirty years as a food critic, very few restaurants have left me speechless. La Table Dorée is one of them. A masterclass in French gastronomy.

contact.title: Share an Exceptional Moment
contact.formNote: We will confirm availability within 24 hours.
contact.pageSubtitle: Book your table for an unforgettable experience.

cta.title: Ready for an Unforgettable Experience?
cta.subtitle: Book now and let our exceptional gastronomy transport you to another world.

metadata.homeTitle: La Table Dorée — French Gastronomy · Paris
metadata.homeDescription: Discover La Table Dorée, 2 Michelin star restaurant in the heart of Paris. Exceptional French cuisine, refined atmosphere, 800+ wine references.
metadata.menuDescription: Explore our gastronomic menu: starters, signature main courses and exceptional desserts. Seasonal produce, local sourcing.
metadata.galerieDescription: Immerse yourself in the visual world of La Table Dorée: open kitchen, elegant dining room, culinary creations.
metadata.contactDescription: Book your table at La Table Dorée restaurant, 15 Rue de la Paix, Paris. Lunch and dinner Tuesday to Sunday.
